what: Find all .md files in vault directories
why: Discover all knowledge entries that need to be indexed

output.console: List of discovered markdown file paths with count

success_handling.criteria: Vault directories are scanned and all .md files are discovered with their paths collected

event.message: Vault scan complete: {file_count} markdown files found

error_handling.criteria: One or more configured vault directories do not exist on disk
error_handling.action: Log warning for missing directories, continue scanning remaining directories

error_handling.criteria: Scan completes but no .md files are discovered in any vault directory
error_handling.action: Proceed with empty index, log informational message

event.message: No markdown files found in vault directories

decisions.outcome: Proceed to parse-frontmatter step with file list
Proceed to build-index step with empty entries list
